title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Provides lifeguard training, swimming lessons, nutrition education, and a preschool program. Volunteer opportunities available. 522 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted; some programs are specific to defined age groups Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 772-6295 103 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 772-6295 Main phone Membership Coordinator (541) 772-6295 ext 103 Jennifer Cook Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; scholarships available DOCUMENTS: Completed membership application. Income verification if applying for a scholarship. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Chinese AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of W 6th and Main Streets. Bus routes 2, 25, and 30. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Preschools Swimming Facilities Water Safety Education Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY FAMILY YMCA
